short_blurb: Quality roofing for Cerritos homes, HOAs, and planned community properties.
local_note: Cerritos is a planned community known for excellent schools and well-maintained HOA neighborhoods. Many Cerritos HOAs require specific roofing materials for consistency within community. We're experienced supplying the documentation, color samples, and approval submissions that HOA architectural committees require. We'll manage the entire approval process on your behalf.

faqs.q: My Cerritos HOA requires a specific tile color — can you match it?
faqs.a: We carry a wide range of Eagle Roofing and Boral tile products in the standard South Bay HOA-approved colors. Bring us your HOA guidelines and we'll confirm we can match the required product before you sign anything.
